$schema_note: Each work: id (slug = folder in assets/img/works), title, category ('illustration' | 'concept-art'), cover (URL, ~1000px for the grid), coverFull (URL, ~2560px shown in the lightbox; optional, falls back to cover), cover4k (URL, full-resolution original preloaded for the dynamic zoom; optional), width/height (real pixel size of cover, used to reserve space in the stacked gallery — zero layout shift), images (array of URLs, optional), description ({en, pt}), alt ({en, pt}, optional), subcategory (illustration sector: 'key-art' | 'posters' | 'book-covers' | 'personal'; optional), order (number for sorting within a gallery, lower = first; multiples of 10 recommended), year, featured (shown on home).

works.title: Destiny 2 - Rite of the Nine Official Promotional Material

alt.en: Destiny 2 Rite of the Nine — official promotional illustration
alt.pt: Destiny 2 Rite of the Nine — ilustração promocional oficial

works.title: The Witness Battle - Destiny 2 - Commission Piece

alt.en: The Witness Battle — Destiny 2 commissioned illustration
alt.pt: The Witness Battle — ilustração comissionada de Destiny 2

description.en: A lone sentinel over iron dunes. A study in harsh midday light and instantly readable silhouette.
description.pt: Sentinela solitária sobre dunas de ferro. Estudo de luz dura do meio-dia e silhueta de leitura imediata.

alt.en: Hooded figure watching a reddish desert from a tower
alt.pt: Figura encapuzada observando um deserto avermelhado do alto de uma torre

description.en: Character portrait surrounded by navigation instruments. The piece that seeded this website's visual identity.
description.pt: Retrato de personagem cercada por instrumentos de navegação. A peça que deu origem à identidade visual deste site.

alt.en: Portrait of a cartographer among maps and compasses
alt.pt: Retrato de uma cartógrafa entre mapas e bússolas

description.en: A dense nocturnal scene — a single point of warm light against the coast's cold palette.
description.pt: Cena noturna de atmosfera densa — um único ponto de luz quente contra a paleta fria da costa.

alt.en: Lit lighthouse on a rocky coast under a night sky
alt.pt: Farol aceso numa costa rochosa sob céu noturno

works.title: Surt and the Storm Dragon - Commission Piece

alt.en: Surt and the Storm Dragon — commissioned concept art
alt.pt: Surt and the Storm Dragon — concept art comissionada

description.en: Creature-environment concept: an ancient machine fused with the landscape. Includes scale studies and surface callouts.
description.pt: Concept de criatura-ambiente: uma máquina ancestral incorporada à paisagem. Inclui estudos de escala e callouts de superfície.

alt.en: Giant machine covered in vegetation, half buried in a valley
alt.pt: Máquina gigante coberta de vegetação, parcialmente enterrada num vale

description.en: Worldbuilding environment: a city crystallized after an unknown event. Keyframe plus palette variations.
description.pt: Ambiente para worldbuilding: cidade cristalizada após um evento desconhecido. Keyframe + variações de paleta.

alt.en: Ruined city with translucent structures reflecting red light
alt.pt: Cidade em ruínas com estruturas translúcidas refletindo luz vermelha

description.en: Prop design: a reconnaissance probe with a functional shape language. Orthographics and material exploration.
description.pt: Design de prop: sonda de reconhecimento com linguagem de formas funcional. Ortográficas e exploração de materiais.

alt.en: Small flying probe with antennas and identification markings
alt.pt: Pequena sonda voadora com antenas e marcações de identificação
